scripts.audit:core: test -f aider-vision-core/scripts/audit_rename_compat.py && python aider-vision-core/scripts/audit_rename_compat.py || echo 'skip audit:core (legacy submodule absent)'
scripts.test:local: yarn tsc --noEmit && yarn test && yarn test:rust
scripts.test:llm:core: cd bright-vision-core && E2E_LLM=1 python -m pytest tests/basic/test_hello_llm.py -q
scripts.test:full: yarn tsc --noEmit && yarn test && yarn test:rust && yarn test:e2e
scripts.test:git-workspace: cd bright-vision-core && python -m pytest tests/basic/test_git_workspace.py tests/basic/test_http_api.py -q
scripts.test:bright-core: cd bright-vision-core && python -m pytest tests/basic/test_git_workspace.py tests/basic/test_workspace_todos.py tests/basic/test_http_api.py tests/basic/test_http_session_todos.py tests/basic/test_superproject_integration.py -q
